data.title: U.S. and UK Stock Markets to Close for Memorial Day and Spring Bank Holiday
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. stock market will be closed on May 26, 2025, in observance of Memorial Day. This closure coincides with the United Kingdom's stock market, which will also be closed for the Spring Bank Holiday. Both markets will resume operations the following day.

data.title: United States DOJ recovers $2.5 million linked to fraudulent crypto schemes
data.description:
The United States Department of Justice (DOJ) has announced the recovery of about $2. 5 million linked to several fraudulent cryptocurrency schemes. According to the DOJ, the recovery was from schemes and ventures that exploited the growing interest of users in the industry. According to the DOJ, the move also underscores an aggressive push to restore […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-doj-recovers-millions-fraudulent-crypto/

data.title: FBI Seizes $24M in Crypto from Russian Cybercrime Kingpin
data.description:
S.   Department of Justice has indicted a Russian national, Rustam Gallyamov, for leading a major global cybercrime ring behind the infamous Qakbot malware. The authorities seized over $24 million in crypto tied to the operation, which is planned to be returned to the victims
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/fbi-seizes-24m-in-crypto-from-russian-cybercrime-kingpin/

data.title: Binance Launches Orbiter Finance (OBT) Trading Competition With $640K in Rewards
data.description: Binance Wallet has launched a new trading competition featuring Orbiter Finance (OBT), offering users a chance to share 50 million OBT tokens (worth approximately $640,000).The campaign runs from May 24, 2025, 08:00 UTC to June 7, 2025, 08:00 UTC and is open to users trading OBT through Binance Wallet (Keyless) or Binance Alpha. The top 6,000 users ranked by cumulative OBT purchase volume will split the prize pool equally, receiving 8,333 OBT each.How to ParticipateUpdate your Binance App to the latest version.Create and back up a Binance Wallet (Keyless) if you haven’t already.Trade OBT via Binance Wallet or Binance Alpha during the promotion period.Only purchase volume counts — selling or bridging tokens does not qualify.No volume cap applies, and rankings will be based solely on cumulative purchases.Key DetailsItemDetailsCampaign DurationMay 24 – June 7, 2025 (08:00 UTC)TokenOrbiter Finance (OBT)Total Rewards50,000,000 OBT (~$640,000)Eligible PlatformsBinance Wallet (Keyless), Binance AlphaWinnersTop 6,000 users by OBT purchase volumeReward per Winner8,333 OBT tokensReward Distribution DateBy June 21, 2025, 16:00 UTC Terms & ConditionsOnly users from eligible regions who have completed KYC verification and hold an active Binance Wallet are eligible.Trades through third-party dApps or token bridging are excluded.Dishonest activity (e.g., wash trading, self-dealing, manipulation) will result in disqualification.Binance may amend or cancel the promotion at its discretion.

data.title: Analysis: Trump's tariff threat caused volatility in the crypto market, and 24-hour long positions have exceeded $500 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The crypto market has experienced violent fluctuations due to the news that former US President Trump announced that he would impose a 50% tariff on EU imports and a 25% tariff on Apple iPhones. The rapid decline in Bitcoin price from above $111,000 has caused turbulent sentiment in the crypto market.
Coinglass data shows that the total amount of cryptocurrency long positions liquidated in the past 24 hours has exceeded US$500 million, with Bitcoin futures liquidating approximately US$182 million and Ethereum futures liquidating nearly US$142 million. Analysts believe that the pullback occurred at a time when Bitcoin was gaining momentum due to ETF inflows and rising institutional interest, highlighting the significant impact of macro policy changes on the crypto market. (CoinDesk)
